title: Playground Configuration Ledger
concept: A settings-first configuration studio for theme authors that treats WordPress, PHP, language, network, multisite, reset, reload, launch, save, and manager work as one modal-free ledger with visible consequences.
focus: destructive reset and saved reload clarity
distinct launch and import route inputs
flows: configure WordPress, PHP, language, network, and multisite before launching
select a Gutenberg branch launch route and see it reflected in the flow receipt
save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with separate progress states
manage saved Playgrounds with rename and delete consequences visible inline
inspect files, blueprint JSON, database, logs, export, and import results from Site Manager
filter the Blueprint gallery, inspect a selected Blueprint, and run it
featureCoverage: GitHub import with account connection note
Blueprint gallery category filters and search
featured Blueprint shortcuts represented in catalog
WordPress version, older versions, PHP, language, network, and multisite settings
destructive Apply Settings and Reset Playground
File browser with create, upload, browse, tree, and code editor
Blueprint editor with copy link, download bundle, and run
database driver, SQLite path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
